extract: Flamethrower redirects here. For the TFG starter set, see Flamethrower (TFG). Flamethrower (Japanese: かえんほうしゃ Flamethrower) is a damage-dealing Fire-type move introduced in Generation I. It is: TM35 from Generation III to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon, and in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM37 in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!. TR02 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM125 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM062 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
